transcript.text:
Wow the size of this...
This alone weighs 5kg (11 lbs)
80% of all King Crabs are from here: East Sea
East Sea King Crabs are not only delicious, but they are fresh!
You have to demolish it
Hello everyone~ I am here in the city of Donghae today
So I've been told that there are a lot of good eateries around here and the beach is right here,
Also, they will be opening KTX here starting February (transportation system)
So many of you guys will have an easier time coming here to enjoy Donghae food
*Prepping to catch King Crab
*Into the water tank
I'm scared!
I'm actually frightened..
They are touching my legs
They are attacking me!
*Tzuyang will soon make them disappear

I'm scared.. *Crab Punch
They are too fresh.. (too alive)
This one is huge!
*I got you!
*Defeat..
I just experience what it feels like catching a King Crab
I am now going to eat King Crab and Snow Crab
This one is the Snow Crab (2kg),
This one is the King Crab (2kg),
This one is the giant King Crab (5kg).
Look at the size of this
This one weighs 5kg.. (11lbs)
It was one of the biggest in the tank
I've seen 4.2kg before but it's my first time seeing a 5kg
This 2kg one is much smaller
It's a lot different right?

Side to side comparison
Look at the difference in size
This one is too heavy I can't hold it up for too long
The snow crab is big too!
Bon Appetit!
These usually come out cracked open, but I asked them not to
Because I wanted to do it myself
It's not getting cut
The leg is huge!
I'll get full from eating the leg
Let's see if it's filled with meat
It tastes amazing
I'm not joking, it's the best King Crab I've ever had
It's sweet, not even salty
It's seasoned/salted just right
Overall, the meat is just so..

This is just insane!
When these are imported from Russia,
They keep it fresh and I feel like it tastes so much better because of the way they preserve it
It's so yummy
Now time for the Snow Crab
The Snow Crab is full of meat
It looks so good. I'm going to go ahead and compare the taste
The taste is amazing
It comes out just like this
The texture of the King Crab meat is chewy
Whereas the texture of the Snow Crab is very soft
and it has its distinct taste which is delicious
The whole thing didn't come out, but it's still this big..
And for the rest of it, Wow there's still so much in here
It's more fun when I crack them open to eat
It's very satisfying when you pull out the meat

*Tzuyang getting satisfied from pulling out the crab meat
There were some tempura here, I'm going to give that a try
It's a shrimp tempura With chili sauce dipping
Shrimp Tempura
Shrimp?
Give that to me
One is marinated with soy sauce and one is spicy
Soy sauce and Spicy sauce
There are eggs in here. The black stuff are eggs
I can take a bite of the head because it's so fresh
It's super sweet. Was that just the sauce?
Spicy Shrimp this time.
It'd be so nice with a bowl of white rice
The head meat pulls out just like this
This one tastes even better than the soy sauce one..
I'm mindblown

I was going to eat it quickly, but I want to slow down and enjoy the flavor
Ah I failed
The meat was just too packed in there, That's why it didn't come out smoothly
I'll go ahead and open up the small King Crab
Jeez, that looks so good
This part is the best. The belly part with the intestine juice.
It's really good
I'll take a spoonful
You're supposed to dip the meat inside the juice here
Just like this~ It's full of meat
The intestines.. So crazy!
Take out the mouth (gills)
I've become so pro at this
I can probably get a job related to this
Cut the middle like this
Cut it~

Although it's good to just take a bite of this,
but push the meat out like this
into the intestines
Mix it all up, This is all meat
Snow Crab is all about the Head Bowl
*Prepping the Snow Crab
I like the Snow Crab better, flavor wise
Open the stomach like this,
I'm already getting too excited
The green-ish colored intestines are literally the best
Meat
It comes out so smoothly
The meat tastes so good
Wow the intestines are no joke
It's a tradition to eat fried rice with Snow Crab intestines
It's sad not to eat them together

*Satisfaction lvl 100
4 legs in 1 bite
Now for the last crab
This is the biggest King Crab I've ever seen
You can't find this anywhere
*Insane amount of meat
Remember I just ate 4 Snow Crab legs? This bite had more meat than that
I'm going to cut up all the legs
Let's open up the body
I can't believe this is even real. The size is unbelievable.
You have to demolish its joints in order to eat it..
Check out the meat on the body
It's this big..
Didn't you eat anything? (asking the cameraman)
You can have 1 leg
It's mine, but I can give you 1

*Can I have 1 more..?
*Meat on the body
Wow it's so big..
This won't crack open, It's like 2 times stronger than the legs
You have to be careful of the spikes on it too
The claws
*It's hammer time
*Crab meat and intestines
It's so good
This is bigger than the clay pot
This alone is a bowl/meal for one
I want to eat the rest with fried rice
And I didn't even really get started on the shrimp, but
I have to head out soon because it will take me 4 hours to go home
So I have to stop eating now and go home before it gets dark
I will take the rest of the food to-go

Thanks everyone!
I'm scared! What if I fall?
The rocks over there are so pretty
Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com
